About Darci

She treats your home like it is her own.

Darci Padilla founded AD's Cleaning Services with one simple belief: every home deserves to be cleaned with care, not just speed. She shows up on time, works with intention, and never cuts corners because she genuinely loves what she does.

When you hand Darci your keys, you are not hiring a stranger. You are welcoming someone who will notice the things others miss and take real pride in every result.

Completely Honest

Straightforward communication and transparent pricing, every time.

Relentlessly Consistent

Same high standard, every single visit. No off days. No excuses.

Detail Obsessed

The corners, the baseboards, the spots others skip. Not with Darci.

Genuinely Warm

Professional always, but never cold. Clients feel the difference immediately.

Real Results

See the difference

Every room. Every surface. Every time.

Bedroom
Bathroom
Kitchen
Living Room
Laundry Room
"She never misses a thing. Not one corner, not one surface."
Paola F. — Ocean City, NJ

Every service, done right.

One standard across every job: results you can see, a home you can feel, and work you never have to double check.

Residential Cleaning

Commercial Cleaning
